security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; media-src 'self' blob:; worker-src 'self'

bundle.longDescription: Anonymous P2P messenger over Tor with E2E encryption.
